titleStmt.title: SII 17.598: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 598. (A.R. No. 553 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti Pūmaṉṉu padumam of Kulōttuṅga. The details of date given viz. Year 10 Dhaṉus śu. 11, Monday, Aśvati, regularly correspond to 1142 A.D., November 30, ·98, ·68.

It records the sale of land made tax free, as kuḍinīkkākkāṉi to god Tiruvārūruḍai yār Śrīmūlasthānamuḍaiyār for the koṟṟu of the 12 tavasiyar who were tending the gardens and supplying Śeṅgaḻunīr-ttiruppaḷḷittāmam from the garden at Vāyaṟṟūr Kulōttuṅgaśōḻaṉ Peruṅguḷam by the sabhā of Rājarājabrahmamaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Tiruvārūr-kūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, having met at Dēvāśriyan Tirukkāvaṇam receiving from the temple 157(1/2) aṉṟāḍu naṟkāśu.

The sale of another piece of land similar to this, for supply of the damanaka flowers is also recorded. The Sabhā reserved for itself the supervisory functions and the responsibility to make over the produce of these lands to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaṉṉu patumam pūtta veḻulakun tāmuṉ ceytavattāl parutivaḻit toṉṟi neṭumālivaneṉac cuṭar muṭi cūṭi Irunila makaḷai Urimaiyiṟ puṇarntu tirumakaḷ paṇaimulaic ceñcāntaḷaintu parumaṇi mārvam paṉivarai nikaṟpa jayamakaḷ ceḻuntaḷac cantaṉac cuvaṭṭāl puyamirukayilaip poruppeṉat toṉṟi nāmakaḷ tāṉum Eṅko makaḷ cevvāyp pavaḷac ceyoḷip paṭaittaṉaṉiyāneṉat tavaḷa naṉṉiṟantaṉit toṭaiyeneṉap pukaḻmakaḷ cintaimakiḻa nāḷilum Orukuṭai
nilavum porupaṭait tikiriveyiluṅ karuṅkali Iruḷiṉait turappa nīṭupallūḻi Eḻukaṭaṟ puṟattinuṅ koṭāc centaṉik koliṉitulāva mīṉamuñ cilaiyuñ citaittu vāṉuyar poṉṉeṭu meruvil puli viṟṟiruppa Umpariyāṉai Oreṭṭiṉukkun tampa meṉṉat taṉittaṉi ticaitoṟum vicaiyastampam niṟpap pacipakaiyāṉatu tītunīṅka maṉṉuyir taḻaippa maṉuvāṟu viḷaṅka mātavar tavamu maṅkaiyar kaṟpum Āti Antaṇarā kutikkaṉalu mīteḻu koṇṭal vīcutaṇpuṉalu metiṉi(l) vaḷamuñ cātioḻukka
mum nitiaṟamum piṟaḻātu nikaḻap pāvum paḻaṉapparappum paṇaikkaimāvu mallatu vaṉṟaḷaip paṭutal kaṉaviluṅ kāṇṭaṟkariteṉa varuntip puṭaiyiṉum palveṟu puḷḷiṉumallatu ciṟaiyeṉappaṭutaliṉṟi niṟai peruñ celavamoṭavaṉivāḻap pallavar telu(ṅ) kar māḷavar kaliṅkar keraḷar kaṉṉaṭar kaṭārar teṉṉavar ciṅkaḷar koṅkaṇar cetikar tirikattar vaṅka raṅkar vattavar mattirar kaṅkar coṉakar kaikaiyar jiṉa reṉṟaṟai kaḻal ventarum Ellāvaraicaru muṟaimaiyi livariṭantiṟai kuṇarnti ṟaiñcavum pe(ri)ḷampo
ṟkoṭi cempiyaṉkiḻānaṭi Orumaruṅkuṭaṉamarntiruppa Aruḷpuri cimaiyappoṟ koṭṭimaiyappā vaiyuñ civaṉumpol Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyā ḷivan tirumaṇimārvat taruḷ muḻutumuṭaiyāḷeṉa Uṭaṉiruppac cempoṉ virasiṅkājaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 10 Āvatu taṉu nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu Ēkāteciyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam rājarāja
brahmamaṅkalattu sabhaikku camainta kūṭṭapperumakkaḷ vāsiṣṭaṉ paramecuvaraṉ periya nampipaṭṭaṉum pārattuvā[ji] gaṅkātaraṉ parameśvarapaṭṭaṉum gautamaṉ parañcoti nañcuṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉum pārattuvāji taṟparamporuḷ Iravipirāṉpaṭṭaṉum pārāciriyaṉ pacupati dakṣaṇāmūrttipaṭṭaṉum kāśyapaṉ Āṇṭanāyakaṉ kuṉikkumpirāṉpaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom tevāṣriyan tirukkāvaṇatte kūṭṭam kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi yiruntu kuṭinikkā kāṇiyāka nilavilaiyāvaṇam Uṭaiyār [śrī]mulastāṉamuṭaiyār Āti caṇṭecuvarade
varkku Iṟaiyiliceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu pavittiramāṇikkavatikku kiḻakku rājarājavāyk kālukku teṟku 2 kuḻi 3 caturattu kiḻakkaṭaiya kāśyapaṉ Aṇṭanāyakaṉ kuṉikkumpirāṉ paṭṭaṉ nilam � Araiyum tillaiyāḷivāykkālukku teṟku 1 kuḻi 2 caturattu meṟkaṭaiya gautamaṉ Aṭikaḷ Āḷuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ va kālum Iṅke 3ñcaturattu kiḻakkaṭaiya tirkkamuṉi Aṭikaḷ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ � Araiyum Iṅke nālāñ caturattu kiḻakkaṭaiya vā[sava]ṉ parameśvaraṉ periyanampipaṭṭaṉ va kālum Iṅke 2 kuḻi 1 caturattu meṟkaṭaiyanilam Arai ni
kki Itaṉ kiḻakku pārāciriyaṉ pacuvati dakṣaṇāmurttipaṭṭaṉ va kālum Itaṉ kiḻakku pārttivaṉ kumariśvaramītiruppaṉ toḷuṭaiyāṉ � va kālum Iṅce 4 ñcaturattu pārāciriyaṉ pacupati tekṣaṇāmurttipaṭṭaṉ nilam Araiyil kuḷam nilam Orumā nīkki va4pa Oṉpatu māvum Itaṉ kiḻakku pārattuvāji taṟparamporuḷ gaṇanātaṉ va kālum Ivvatikku kiḻakku kulottuṅkacoḻa vāykkālukku teṟku 1 kuḻi 2 caturattu meṟkaṭaiya gautamaṉ Aṭikaḷ civatevapaṭṭaṉ va kālum Itaṉ kiḻakku gautamaṉ Aṭikaḷ tiruveṇkāṭu
paṭṭaṉ va kālum Iṅke 3 ñcaturattu meṟkaṭaiya pārattuvāji taṟparamporuḷ Iravi pirāṉ paṭṭaṉ va pa Āṟumā Āka 3� Iṉṉilamuṉṟaraiyum Uṭaiyār tiruvāru ruṭaiyār śrīmulastāṉamuṭaiyārkku ceṅkaḻanirt tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ākkum vāyaṟ ṟūr kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ peruṅkuḷattu ceṅkaḻanir tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ākkum tavaciyar paṉṉiruvarkku koṟṟukku Iṟuppatāka Ittevar Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu māttāl kācu Iraṇṭekālāka kācu
100 5 10 7� Ikkācu nūṟṟaiyampatteḻaraiyum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu kuṭinikkā Iṟaiyiliyāka ceytukuṭuttom Iṉṉam nāṅkaḷ Ivvūr Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu tiruvāruruṭaiyār śrī mulastāṉa muṭaiyār tirunantavaṉam tirumāḷikaikku teṟkaṭaiya tirunāvukkaraceṉṟu per kūvap paṭṭa tamaṉakat tirunantavaṉattukku nantavaṉappuṟamāka viṟṟukkuṭukkiṉṟa Ivvūrp pavittira māṇikkavatikku kiḻakku tillai Āḷivāykkālukku ḷu 3 kuḻi 1 caturattu meṟkaṭaiya � Araiyum Ivvatikku kiḻakku kulottuṅkacoḻavāy
kkālukku te 1 kuḻi 1 caturattu 1 li veliyum Āka �1 � Oṉṟaraiyum Iṟaiyili ceytu Eṅkaḷukku kuṭinikkā kāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttukkoḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 6 10 Ikkācu Aṟupatum kāṭṭeṟṟik kaicce(l)lvaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai Āvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom tiruvāruruṭaiyār śrīmulastāṉamuṭaiyār Āticaṇ ṭeśvaratevarkku Āka � lim Aiyvelikku kācu 2 100 10 7� Ikkācu Irunūṟṟoru patteḻaraiyum kaicce(l)lavaṟakkoṇṭu Innilam Aiveliyil menokkina maramum kīṉokkiya kiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom
Āticaṇṭeśvararatevarkku sabhaikku camainta Ivvaṉaivom Iṉṉilam Aiyveliyum Eṅkaḷukku kuṭinikkāiṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttu Iṉṉilam Aiyveliyum kārmaṟu voṭu veli Oṉṟukku nūṟṟirupatiṉkalamāka vanta nellu Eṇṇāḻiyum vaḻuvilā marakkālāl kār pāti pacāṉam pātiyāka Iṭṭu kaḷatte Aḷakkakkaṭavomākavum Ūr paṭu maṟcāti Antarāyam Eṅkaḷūrile vaikka kaṭavomākavum Ivarkaḷ Aḷavukoṇṭa nellile kalattuvāy Aiññāḻinellāka vanta nellu cumaikūli koṇṭu nikki Uḷḷa nellu tiruvārurile kār pāti pacāṉam pātiyāka Iṭṭukkuṭukka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi sam
matittu Iṉṉilam Aiyveliyum kuṭinikkāyiṟaiyili ceytukuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvā rur Uṭaiyār śrīmulastāṉamuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkku Ivvūr sabhaikku camainta vāsiṣṭaṉ parameśvaraṉ periyanampipaṭṭaṉum pārattuvāji geṅ kātaraṉ parameśvara paṭṭaṉum gautamaṉ parañcoti nañcuṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉum pārattuvāji taṟparamporuḷ Iravipirāṉ paṭṭaṉum pālāśrīyaṉ pacupati tekṣaṇāmūrttipaṭṭaṉum kāśyapaṉ Aṇṭanāyakaṉ kuṉikkumpirāṉpaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom Iṉṉilat tukku Ivvūril vanta peruvari cilavari nāṅkaḷe Iṟukka ka
ṭavomākavum santirātittavaṟ śāśvatitāka Eṅkaḷukku kuṭinikkākkāṇiyāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷappeṟuvatāka sammatittom Ivvaṉaivom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Eḻutinen Ivvūr mattiyattaṉ vallamuṭaiyāṉ kuṭitāṅki Ātittatevanāṉ bhaṭṭappiriyaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ivvūr mattiyattaṉ vallamuṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ mātevanāṉa brahmapiriyaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vāsiṣṭhaṉ parameśvaraṉ periyanampipaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kā[ śyapa] ṉ Aṇṭa nāyakaṉ kuṉikkumpirāṉpaṭṭa
neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cuppiramaṇya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pārattuvāji gaṅkātaraṉ parameśvarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku gautamaṉ parañcoti nañcuṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pārāśrīyaṉ pacupati tekṣaṇāmūrtti paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai gautamaṉ Aṭikaḷ tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kāśyapaṉ niṟaṇintāṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pārat tuvāji taṟparamporuḷ Iravipirāṉpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.598 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
